summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Products page and navigation functionality. Products page loads correctly with all sections, but found navigation active state bug where both Home and Products nav links highlight simultaneously on /products page.

ui_bugs.issue: Both Home and Products nav links show active state (gold highlighting) when on /products page. Only Products should be active.
ui_bugs.expected_behavior: Only Products nav link should be highlighted gold on /products page, Home should be inactive (white/80)

passed_tests: Products page loads correctly at /products route with hero section
Hero section displays 'Engineered Precision' heading correctly
Category 01: Passenger Car Motor Oil section renders with Dune Apex GT-1 product
Product specifications (API SP, ILSAC GF-6A, ACEA A3/B4) and sizes (1L, 4L, 5L) display correctly
Download Technical Sheet button is present and clickable
Category 02: Heavy Duty Diesel Engine Oil section renders with Dune Titan HDX product
Diesel product stats cards (15W-40, CK-4, 20L) display correctly
Request Bulk Pricing button is present and clickable
Category 03: Brake Oil section renders with DOT 3 and DOT 4 cards
DOT 3 Standard Safety and DOT 4 High Temp Pro cards display correctly
Brake disc image card renders properly
CTA section displays 'Need a custom lubricant solution?' heading
Speak to an Engineer and Download Catalog buttons are present and clickable
Footer renders correctly on Products page
Navigation from Home to Products works (URL changes correctly)
Navigation from Products to Home works (URL changes correctly)
Product category cards on homepage (Automotive, Industrial, Marine) link to /products
Full Catalog button on homepage navigates to /products
Home nav link is correctly active (gold) on homepage
Products nav link is correctly inactive (white/80) on homepage
Mobile responsiveness works correctly on Products page
Mobile menu opens and closes properly
Mobile navigation links work correctly
All buttons remain clickable on mobile devices
All product sections are responsive on mobile
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation active state bug in Navbar component - both Home and Products nav links are highlighted when on /products page, only Products should be active
